data.title: RED: Write failing validation test suite for @playwright/cli capabilities
data.description:
## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh with 8 test functions that assert @playwright/cli capabilities. All tests must fail (RED) because the test HTML fixtures and wrapper logic do not yet exist. RED state is based on fixture/logic absence, not package absence.

Test functions:
- test_playwright_cli_installed: asserts npx @playwright/cli --version exits 0
- test_run_code_async_wait_for_selector: asserts run-code with page.waitForSelector completes within 60s on test HTML page
- test_run_code_async_wait_for_load_state: asserts run-code with page.waitForLoadState completes within 60s
- test_binary_sharing_chromium_revision: asserts CLI and Python Playwright report same Chromium revision
- test_session_persistence: asserts navigate+click across separate Bash calls with same -s=spike-test session preserves page state
- test_output_format_snapshot: asserts snapshot output contains structured accessibility tree
- test_output_format_screenshot: asserts screenshot saves file to specified path
- test_output_format_console: asserts console messages output contains structured message format

Include setup/teardown functions for session cleanup (npx @playwright/cli close -s=spike-test before session tests).
Export PATH=./spike-env/node_modules/.bin:$PATH at top of test file for project-local install.
If any shell helper functions are introduced in later tasks, corresponding unit tests using mock inputs must be added here.

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh (CREATE)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] Test file exports PATH with spike-env prefix
  Verify: grep -q "spike-env/node_modules/.bin" tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED test file failures are expected and do not break the suite
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
